name: academorix/credentials
purpose: Physical access credentials — Credential (NFC / RFID / QR) bound to a polymorphic holder, Gate reader inventory, and CheckinLog raw event stream.
capabilities: Credential model (cnl_...) with UID + polymorphic holder
Gate reader with label + heartbeat + location
Ties into entitlements for pass gating
when_to_use: Wiring NFC/RFID/QR check-in at a branch — issuing credentials and streaming Gate check-in events.
when_not_to_use: For third-party API keys and integration secrets, use the sibling academorix/integrations package.
